name: TMA AI expense import via Worker OpenAI-compatible parser
description: TMA users can paste free-form Vietnamese expense text; the Worker calls an OpenAI-compatible chat API (env-driven), returns valid parsed expenses only (defaults: source=bank-transfer, date=TMA client local today), and TMA shows a per-item preview with include/exclude + personal/household/group context, then creates selected items sequentially through the existing `POST /api/v1/expenses` with partial success and no duplicate retry.

planned: Worker: add strict parse contracts, OpenAI-compatible parser/client, protected POST /expenses/parse handler, route registration, and tests for multi-expense parse/defaults/filtering/auth/no-write behavior.
TMA: add parse API/hook, short-lived import store, text input route, preview import route, context selectors, include/exclude, and sequential create confirmation with partial success status.
Verification: targeted Worker/TMA tests, typecheck, test suite, final ./init.sh when ready. Review gates for TypeScript/security and TMA UI/UX.
artifacts: apps/tma/src/features/expenses/import-store.ts (setItemCategory action for editable category on draft)
apps/tma/src/routes/add-expense-import-preview-item-card.tsx (compact NativePicker replaces static label; icon reactive to selected category)
verification: ./init.sh test -> OK (Worker 433 tests/82 files, TMA 97 tests/20 files)

Oracle Worker review surfaced 4 real issues; all fixed (parsedExpenseItemSchema.safeParse wired, AI occurredAt regex-checked with default fallback, AI_TIMEOUT_MS 30000->20000 with paid-plan comment, explicit use('/expenses/parse', authMiddleware), dead rawAiExpenseItemSchema removed).

Designer TMA review surfaced 4 priority issues; all fixed (mount reset() removed in chat, success status skipped in selectedCount/confirm loop, hardcoded colors replaced with --color-tma-error/--color-tma-error-bg tokens, preview cards animated with --animate-tma-card-enter + prefers-reduced-motion).
Final lint pass required removing one stale `rawText` selector from add-expense-import-preview.tsx; full ./init.sh then returned Done!.

notes: OpenAI-compatible config keys are deploy-time env values the user will provide. AI output is treated as untrusted; parsedExpenseItemSchema.safeParse + categoryKindMap expense-kind refine + REFERENCE_SOURCE_KEYS enum filtering is the trust boundary. Parse endpoint never writes D1. TMA confirm uses existing POST /expenses sequentially; partial success is allowed (no rollback) and retry skips items already marked status=success to prevent duplicates. Rate limit, multi-provider UI, prompt-history, caching, and web parity are explicit out-of-scope MVP gaps. No commit made (user did not request).
